notes: Remote South Africa node reached over Tailscale at 100.81.255.104.
Intended as Tailscale host, backup/sync node, and exit-node candidate.
Destination remains disabled until remote Borgmatic transport, repository path, excludes, and passphrase handling are configured.
Use lower-frequency monitoring than local LAN hosts.

rollout_status.backup_status: planned; do not enable timers until repo path, excludes, and secrets are configured

hosts.description: Remote seedbox / remote sync / backup helper

notes: May act as offsite sync or backup relay.

observability.metric_status: live metrics are loaded separately by browser Prometheus queries; missing data must render as unknown

primary_target.reason: FQDN resolves over Tailscale and is too taxing on the Raspberry Pi backup host.
primary_target.repo_status: destination repository directories already exist on jellybackup, one per server.
primary_target.ssh_status: ssh-copy-id has been completed from jellyhome, jellybase, and jellyberry.

steps: restore or clone source directory recorded in service metadata
restore config from Borg or redeploy config from Git
do not restore cache unless explicitly needed
restore config and persistent data from Borg
restore central PostgreSQL using postgres-volume-and-logical-dumps rules on jellybase
recreate required secret files under /opt/docker/.secrets without printing values
sync docker config and deploy manyfold plus manyfold-valkey
verify Manyfold HTTP health, database connectivity, and restored library/model/model-file counts
verify required secret files exist outside Git
if volume restore is unusable, restore globals and per-database dumps from logical-dumps/latest
restore or clone source directory recorded in service metadata
verify build context and Dockerfile exist
restore /opt/docker/appdata/SERVICE from Borg, including SQLite database and WAL/SHM sidecars when present
restore or clone source directory recorded in service metadata when the service is source-built
verify HTTP/API health and expected database records
restore or clone source directory recorded in service metadata
restore uploads from Borg only if retention is required

runbooks.title: Backup Management Read Only Ui Guide
